continue to develop and implement productivity tools, including freight flow optimization and advanced AI customer service tools

limitations: No quantified dollar amounts or headcount figures tied specifically to AI investment were found in the excerpts; the $400 million figure cited relates to energy efficiency/HVAC/LED projects, not AI.
AI investment intensity scored 3 rather than 4/5 due to absence of any quantified AI-specific spend or multi-year commitment figures.
Narrative concreteness scored 4 (deployed with operating detail) rather than 5 because no quantified business results (%, $, time saved) were disclosed for AI use cases.
Risk disclosure scored 5 based on named AI Governance Committee (governance-backed treatment) and specific risk mechanisms; promotional framing of governance capabilities noted.
